query:
-- Video 1: Executive Leadership Coach
INSERT INTO videoScripts (userId, serviceId, videoType, duration, scenes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  780001,
  'explainer',
  28,
  '[{"sceneNumber":1,"duration":3,"voiceoverText":"Still waiting for that VP title you earned years ago?","onScreenText":"Still waiting?","pexelsQuery":"businesswoman serious office waiting"},{"sceneNumber":2,"duration":4,"voiceoverText":"It\'s infuriating to hear \'not ready yet\' after outperforming your male peers.","onScreenText":"Not ready yet?","pexelsQuery":"woman frustrated corporate meeting"},{"sceneNumber":3,"duration":5,"voiceoverText":"As a former Fortune 500 CHRO, I\'ve promoted over 200 women into senior roles.","onScreenText":"200+ women promoted","pexelsQuery":"professional women leadership conference"},{"sceneNumber":4,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"The Executive Edge shows you how to strategically articulate your impact, command the room, and secure that overdue promotion and salary. No more waiting.","onScreenText":"Command the room","pexelsQuery":"businesswoman confident presentation boardroom"},{"sceneNumber":5,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Stop losing out. Click Learn More to see how to get your VP title within the next 12 months.","onScreenText":"Get your VP title","pexelsQuery":"woman celebrating career success office"}]',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SET @script1 = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO videos (userId, scriptId, visualStyle, musicStyle, creatomateStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, @script1, 'text_only', 'energetic', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());

-- Video 2: Dog Reactivity Trainer
INSERT INTO videoScripts (userId, serviceId, videoType, duration, scenes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  780001,
  'explainer',
  28,
  '[{"sceneNumber":1,"duration":3,"voiceoverText":"Losing the joy of dog walks because of leash reactivity?","onScreenText":"Losing the joy?","pexelsQuery":"person walking dog leash street"},{"sceneNumber":2,"duration":4,"voiceoverText":"That gut-wrenching dread every time you see another dog, wondering if this walk will end in a lunge-fest or a full-blown meltdown.","onScreenText":"Gut-wrenching dread","pexelsQuery":"dog pulling leash owner stressed"},{"sceneNumber":3,"duration":5,"voiceoverText":"As a certified applied animal behaviourist, I\'ve helped over 1,200 reactive dogs find their calm.","onScreenText":"1,200+ dogs helped","pexelsQuery":"dog trainer professional calm dog"},{"sceneNumber":4,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"We use science-backed methods to rewire your dog\'s brain, replacing fear with focus. Imagine walking past another dog — no pulling, no barking, just a loose leash.","onScreenText":"Fear to focus","pexelsQuery":"happy dog walking calm loose leash"},{"sceneNumber":5,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Stop avoiding walks. Click the link to book your free discovery call and learn how to get your calm dog back.","onScreenText":"Get your calm dog","pexelsQuery":"person happy dog park success"}]',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SET @script2 = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO videos (userId, scriptId, visualStyle, musicStyle, creatomateStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, @script2, 'text_only', 'energetic', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());

-- Video 3: Crypto Day Trader Coach
INSERT INTO videoScripts (userId, serviceId, videoType, duration, scenes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  780001,
  'explainer',
  28,
  '[{"sceneNumber":1,"duration":3,"voiceoverText":"Still losing funded accounts after passing the challenge?","onScreenText":"Losing accounts?","pexelsQuery":"trader frustrated looking at screen"},{"sceneNumber":2,"duration":4,"voiceoverText":"That 2-week expiry on your funded account keeps hitting, wiping out all your hard work.","onScreenText":"2-week expiry","pexelsQuery":"stock market charts declining loss"},{"sceneNumber":3,"duration":5,"voiceoverText":"I spent 7 years on a prop desk, trading bank capital. Now I mentor retail traders.","onScreenText":"7 years prop desk","pexelsQuery":"professional trader multiple screens office"},{"sceneNumber":4,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"I\'ll show you the exact risk management and execution protocols top traders use to consistently pull 5-figure monthly withdrawals.","onScreenText":"5-figure withdrawals","pexelsQuery":"trading charts rising profit green"},{"sceneNumber":5,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Stop blowing accounts. Click Learn More to see how The Funded Trader Blueprint gets you consistent monthly payouts.","onScreenText":"Consistent payouts","pexelsQuery":"trader celebrating laptop success"}]',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SET @script3 = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO videos (userId, scriptId, visualStyle, musicStyle, creatomateStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, @script3, 'text_only', 'energetic', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());

-- Video 4: Wedding Photographer Business Coach
INSERT INTO videoScripts (userId, serviceId, videoType, duration, scenes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  780001,
  'explainer',
  28,
  '[{"sceneNumber":1,"duration":3,"voiceoverText":"Losing out on five-figure wedding bookings?","onScreenText":"Five-figure bookings?","pexelsQuery":"wedding photographer camera outdoor"},{"sceneNumber":2,"duration":4,"voiceoverText":"Tired of brides asking for discounts on your second shooter or album upgrades?","onScreenText":"Tired of discounts?","pexelsQuery":"photographer frustrated looking at phone"},{"sceneNumber":3,"duration":5,"voiceoverText":"I went from $1,800 to $9,500 per wedding in 18 months.","onScreenText":"$1,800 to $9,500","pexelsQuery":"luxury wedding elegant venue reception"},{"sceneNumber":4,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Six Figure Lens shows you how to attract clients who value your art and pay premium rates without negotiating.","onScreenText":"Premium rates","pexelsQuery":"wedding photographer confident shooting"},{"sceneNumber":5,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Click below to see the exact method I used to book $8,000+ weddings consistently.","onScreenText":"$8,000+ weddings","pexelsQuery":"wedding couple happy photographer celebrating"}]',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SET @script4 = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO videos (userId, scriptId, visualStyle, musicStyle, creatomateStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, @script4, 'text_only', 'energetic', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());

-- Video 5: Postpartum Fitness Coach
INSERT INTO videoScripts (userId, serviceId, videoType, duration, scenes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  780001,
  'explainer',
  28,
  '[{"sceneNumber":1,"duration":3,"voiceoverText":"That moment you go to pick up your baby and your core just… isn\'t there.","onScreenText":"Core isn\'t there","pexelsQuery":"mother baby home tired"},{"sceneNumber":2,"duration":4,"voiceoverText":"You try to walk further, but your hips ache, and lifting the car seat feels like a marathon.","onScreenText":"Hips ache","pexelsQuery":"mother carrying baby struggling"},{"sceneNumber":3,"duration":5,"voiceoverText":"As a pelvic floor physio and strength coach, I\'ve guided hundreds of mothers back to full strength.","onScreenText":"Hundreds helped","pexelsQuery":"fitness trainer women workout studio"},{"sceneNumber":4,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"The Strong Mama Method blends specialised pelvic floor recovery with progressive strength training. Build a resilient body, safely and effectively.","onScreenText":"Resilient body","pexelsQuery":"woman exercising strong confident gym"},{"sceneNumber":5,"duration":8,"voiceoverText":"Discover how to feel strong and like yourself again. Tap Learn More to explore the Strong Mama Method.","onScreenText":"Feel strong again","pexelsQuery":"mother baby happy healthy outdoor"}]',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SET @script5 = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO videos (userId, scriptId, visualStyle, musicStyle, creatomateStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, @script5, 'text_only', 'energetic', 'pending', NOW(), NOW());
